subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! The light of Thy countenance hath guided me, the fire of Thy Lote-Tree hath enraptured me, Thy Most Exalted Word hath overcome me
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی نور وجهک دلنی و نار سدرتک انجذبتنی و کلمتک العلیا اخذتنی و ندائک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
